payload.summary: Jim proposal 2026-07-21: route responsibilities to different agents/models — e.g. Fable for architecture, Opus for implementation. Must span both agentic CLIs (claude, codex, cursor-agent) and per-model routing inside one harness. Prior art: Cursor pstack (https://github.com/cursor/plugins/tree/main/pstack) — /setup-pstack detects available models, writes an always-applied rule mapping each role (code, judgment, review panels) to a model; defaults overridable per responsibility. Phase 1 PRD candidate — scope needs Jim.
